seoTitle: How to Make a Typeform Quiz Step by Step
metaDescription: Learn how to build a Typeform quiz with scoring, correct answers, and custom design for education, training, or lead generation.
intro: Quizzes are an engaging way to educate, train, or generate leads, and Typeform makes building one straightforward. This guide covers how to create a quiz from scratch, assign correct answers, calculate scores automatically, and customize the design before sharing it with participants.

steps.heading: Create a new quiz
steps.body: Start a new Typeform and choose the quiz format so you have access to scoring and answer-key features.

steps.heading: Add questions and answers
steps.body: Build out your quiz questions using different question types, and specify which answer choices are correct for each one.

steps.heading: Configure scoring and logic
steps.body: Set up automatic score calculation based on correct answers, and add logic if you want the quiz to branch based on responses.

steps.heading: Publish and share the quiz
steps.body: Finalize the design and publish the quiz, then share the link with your intended audience, whether students, trainees, or leads.

faq.question: Does Typeform calculate quiz scores automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, once you assign correct answers and enable scoring, Typeform calculates each respondent's score automatically.

faq.question: Can I use a quiz for lead generation instead of education?
faq.answer: Yes, quizzes are commonly used for lead generation and customer engagement in addition to education and training purposes.

faq.question: Can respondents see their score immediately?
faq.answer: Typeform can be configured to show results or scores to respondents right after they complete the quiz, depending on your settings.

faq.question: What question types work in a Typeform quiz?
faq.answer: Typeform supports multiple question types for quizzes, including multiple choice and other formats suited to assigning correct answers.
